about.title: About

summary.firstSentence: I'm a backend developer specialized in integrating and evaluating LLMs in production.
summary.continued: Three and a half years across QA, backend, and AI engineering.
summary.body: Currently at Oro Colombia building WISO — an operational platform where I integrated GPT-4.1 Nano via WhatsApp and built CI-integrated evaluation pipelines in Python/Jupyter. Previously at Wookky as QA Automation + Backend Developer, leading LLM eval strategy for an e-commerce AI assistant. Before that, medical interpreter at Teleperformance — EN↔ES, under pressure, professional ethics.

about.otherWork: These projects are what I'd point to first. I've shipped more across finance, e-commerce, CRM, internal agency tools and native mobile QA — happy to walk through specifics in conversation. The portfolio surfaces the AI-adjacent ones because that's where my craft is sharpest.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Open to remote roles and relocation across Europe — especially Spain.
